input.background: In a case-controlled study on cerebral tumors and cell phone use, tumors occurred more frequently on the same side of the head where cellular telephones had been used in 26 of 41 cases.
input.question: Discuss the significance level and the conclusion of the hypothesis test.

output.answer: The results are significant at $\alpha=0.10$ (reject $H_0$) but not significant at $\alpha=0.05$ (retain $H_0$).

meta_info.caption: Cerebral tumors and cell phone use.
